title: state kinds umbrella (was jssm#909)
manager: The umbrella for state 'kinds' — per-state visual-status predicates (terminal, error, active, custom) declared canonically as `state * terminal: {}`, replacing the deprecated `<kind>_state:` forms. Kinds are how a machine tells the renderer 'treat these states as a category' so styling, differentiation, and legends all key off one declared truth rather than ad-hoc per-state markup.
cs: needs a spec first (omissions C); `state * terminal: {}` canonical, `<kind>_state:` deprecated; feeds node-kind theming and the differentiation work
